chapter_title.ar: باب  فِي أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ شَيْ‏ءٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا بِسَبْعَةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 25 – Regarding that there is nothing coming into being in the skies and the earth except with seven (characteristics)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/151)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/151)

parts.text: أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام )

text: لَا يَكُونُ شَيْ‏ءٌ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ لَا فِي الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا بِسَبْعٍ بِقَضَاءٍ وَ قَدَرٍ وَ إِرَادَةٍ وَ مَشِيئَةٍ وَ كِتَابٍ وَ أَجَلٍ وَ إِذْنٍ فَمَنْ زَعَمَ غَيْرَ هَذَا فَقَدْ كَذَبَ عَلَى اللَّهِ أَوْ رَدَّ عَلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: And he (Ali Bin Ibrahim) reported from his father as weel, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Zakariyya Bin Imran,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Nothing comes into being in the skies nor in the earth except by seven – By (Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’s) Ordainment, and (Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’s) Determination, and (Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’s) Intention, and (Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’s) Desire, and (Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’s) Writing (Decreeing), and (Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’s) Term and Permission. So the one who claims other than this, so he has lied against Allah<sup>azwj</sup> or rejected upon Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’.
en.sarwar: 2. He has narrated it from his father from Muhammad ibn Khalid from Zakariya ibn ‘Imran from abu al-Hassan Musa ibn Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. There is nothing in heavens or on earth without seven: the decree, the measure, the will, the wish, the record (book) the duration and the permission. Whoever, would think something else he certainly has spoken a lie against Allah or has rejected Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High.
